title: Taiga Biome Water Fix
description: Datapack to fix MC-239444, which causes frozen rivers to generate in Taiga Biomes.
body:
# Taiga Biome Bug Fix
Datapack solves the MC-239444 bug that causes Regular Taiga biomes to generate inside of Snowy Biome Temperature Noise Values, resulting in Frozen Rivers, Oceans, and Snowy Beaches generating next to Regular Taiga Biomes, resulting in weird generation.

Unfortunately, because this overwrites the Biome generation, this is likely incompatible with other Biome Worldgen Mods/Datapacks. Spreading awareness of this bug may make the creators of these Mods/Datapacks make this change as well.
